name: ssd-marketing-video
description: Remotion video pipeline for SSD Consulting marketing (self-contained, React — does NOT touch the Nuxt app)

scripts.render:all: npm run render:wide && npm run render:vertical && npm run render:square
scripts.render:hookpack: remotion render HookPack-A-Pain out/ssd-hook-a-pain.mp4 && remotion render HookPack-B-Curiosity out/ssd-hook-b-curiosity.mp4 && remotion render HookPack-C-Outcome out/ssd-hook-c-outcome.mp4
scripts.render:adcut: remotion render AdCut-Vertical out/ssd-adcut-vertical.mp4 && remotion render AdCut-Square out/ssd-adcut-square.mp4
